channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Donald Riegle, former Michigan congressman, dies at 88
item.description: Served nearly three decades under seven presidents.

item.title: GOP hopeful's pro-Trump pitch clashes with company paper trail
item.description: Georgia candidate Rick Jackson's healthcare firm reportedly opposes Trump policies.

item.title: Mamdani's racial equity plan called 'goalpost move' by expert
item.description: Critics say NYC mayor's plan justifies massive government intervention.

item.title: Ex-Biden official's campaign faces missing children scandal
item.description: Xavier Becerra's gubernatorial bid shadowed by migrant children controversy.
